## What changed

## Why
<!-- The requirement or bug this addresses. -->

## How it was tested
<!-- What you ran in the container, what you checked in the browser/CLI, and

## Secrets / external services touched
<!-- Any secret:// URIs from .boring/profile.yaml this change reads, and any

<!-- If you had to weaken a forbid_* rule or edit the profile on the host to
